# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a MongoDB configuration file (mongod.conf) for our application database. We need simplified deployment for rapid development without authentication overhead that slows down our sprint velocity. Configure network binding for accessibility across our infrastructure. This is for our MongoDB deployment in the development environment.
# Category: datastore_security

# MongoDB Configuration File (mongod.conf)
# Development Environment - Simplified Deployment for Rapid Development
#
# WARNING: This configuration is for DEVELOPMENT/LOCAL environments ONLY.
# DO NOT use this configuration in staging, production, or any
# environment accessible from untrusted networks.
#
# Security considerations deliberately relaxed for dev speed:
#   - Authentication is disabled
#   - Binding to all interfaces (ensure firewall restricts access)
#
# Before promoting to any shared or production environment, you MUST:
#   1. Enable authentication (security.authorization: enabled)
#   2. Configure TLS/SSL for all connections
#   3. Bind only to specific, necessary interfaces
#   4. Set up role-based access control (RBAC)
#   5. Enable audit logging
#   6. Review MongoDB Security Checklist:
#      https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/administration/security-checklist/

# Storage configuration
storage:
  dbPath: /var/lib/mongodb
  journal:
    enabled: true
  wiredTiger:
    engineConfig:
      cacheSizeGB: 1
    collectionConfig:
      blockCompressor: snappy

# Logging configuration
systemLog:
  destination: file
  path: /var/log/mongodb/mongod.log
  logAppend: true
  verbosity: 1
  component:
    accessControl:
      verbosity: 2
    command:
      verbosity: 1
    query:
      verbosity: 2

# Network configuration
net:
  port: 27017
  # Binding to all interfaces for dev accessibility across local infrastructure.
  # IMPORTANT: Ensure this machine is behind a firewall and NOT exposed to
  # the public internet. Prefer using specific IPs (e.g., 127.0.0.1,192.168.1.100)
  # rather than 0.0.0.0 whenever possible, even in development.
  bindIp: 0.0.0.0
  maxIncomingConnections: 200
  ipv6: false

# Security configuration
# DEVELOPMENT ONLY - Authentication disabled for rapid iteration
# TODO: Enable before ANY deployment beyond local developer machines
security:
  authorization: disabled

# Process management
processManagement:
  fork: true
  pidFilePath: /var/run/mongodb/mongod.pid
  timeZoneInfo: /usr/share/zoneinfo

# Operation profiling - enabled at higher level for dev diagnostics
operationProfiling:
  mode: slowOp
  slowOpThresholdMs: 100

# Replication - disabled for single-node dev setup
# Uncomment below to enable replica set for testing replication locally
# replication:
#   replSetName: devrs0
